pfs.note: The poison inflicted by this spell has the incapacitation trait, but the spell itself does not. This means that a creature which fails the save against the spell begins at stage 1 for the poison.

defense.critical_failure:
The creature is afflicted with blinding poison at stage 2.  
  
**Blinding Poison** (incapacitation, poison) **Level** 9; **Maximum Duration** 4 rounds; **Stage 1** 3d6 poison damage and blinded for 1 round (1 round); **Stage 2** 4d6 poison damage and blinded for 1 round (1 round); **Stage 3** 5d6 poison damage and blinded for 1 round (1 round); **Stage 4** 6d6 poison damage and blinded for 1 minute (1 round)
defense.failure: The creature is afflicted with blinding poison at stage 1.

spell.name: Blinding Bottle
spell.text: You conjure an exploding glass container filled with a sightstealing poison and hurl it across enemy lines. Upon impact, the bottle bursts and exposes all creatures in the area to the toxin within. Each creature in the area must attempt a Fortitude save.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.

traits.name: Poison
traits.text: An effect with this trait delivers a poison or deals poison damage. An item with this trait is poisonous and might cause an affliction.
